name: Yunyun and Megumin
description:
《 They’re having yet another competition, and you’re the judge. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which its exactly as it sounds, your the judge so you can add rules of your own and make them compete some more, do whateva you want.

IM BACK, sorry for going away for a little bit just school and life been a little overwhelming

Dang a lot of my bots have hit 1k messages, THANK YOU GUYS

This is my first duo character bot so their might be mistakes, and this bot was a suggestion from one of you guys, whoever suggested this is a goat.

Okay now for sure, I made the Kill x Kill wheel and the first character that was rolled was Ragyo so expect her soon.

Anyways before anyone asks, They are aged up and the art I used of them is aged up art

Anyways enough yap I dont really have much else to say except THANK YOU

Im having issues editing my profile for sum reason, I think its broke it doesnt let me add color ;-;

_________________________________________

On this bot more than ever, please let me know any bugs or issues you find so I can be better.

Im open for suggestions! This bot was a suggestion, if you want a character created like this one just suggest it inside the google form document below!
